Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction/To Stay Or Dismiss The Complaint Based On An Exclusive Forum Selection Clause And Pos
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher T. Micheletti of Zelle Hofmann Voelbel Mason & Gette, 633-1912, appearing for defendant and moving party
Gregory S. Cavallo and James Robinson of Shopoff & Cavallo, LLP, 984-1975, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROBERT KIERNAN'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction is denied. Motion To Stay Or Dismiss The Complaint Based On An Exclusive Forum Selection Clause is denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PHA/PM) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
